description: Update your style quotient with ease by adding this stylish bag from lino perros to your accessory collection. Roomy and comfortable to carry, the smooth silhouette of this bag blends well with any outfit. Height: 28 cm Width: 37 cm Depth: 13 cm Made of blended fabric with synthetic overlays for durability Has one main roomy, zipped compartment with one inner zipped compartment, a zipper separator and an organiser pouch for essentials Two short synthetic leather handles woven through metallic buckles for carrying ease and style Two zippered pockets on the front Stitch detailing, branded zips and brand badge embossed on the front Legs at base Care Wipe surface with a damp, clean cloth to remove dust
